Home.mcpTitle: Bring every skill into the tools you already use.
Home.mcpDescription: OceanSkill MCP securely delivers protected skill instructions to compatible agent clients. Your public browsing stays simple; authentication, credits, and usage remain enforced at the service boundary.

discover.description: Evaluate public metadata, compatibility, and release readiness.

connect.description: Add OceanSkill MCP to your preferred supported agent client.

invoke.title: Invoke
invoke.description: Request protected skill content only when your workflow needs it.

Home.knowledgeSubtitle: Read practical guides or ask OceanGuide for a grounded answer.
Home.chatbotCardDescription: OceanGuide answers questions about MCP setup, choosing skills, usage, credits, and security from curated public sources.
Home.aboutTitle: A marketplace designed around the agent trust boundary.
Home.aboutDescription: Public pages reveal enough metadata to evaluate a skill. The complete SKILL.md remains protected and is delivered through authenticated MCP calls, with usage and credits enforced in Supabase.
